languages.text: "И последнее. Нужно любой ценой заполучить клинок — Багряную пляску Кхейна. Пока он находится в руках Себериана, наше предложение вступить в переговоры с Инквизицией выглядит смехотворно. Если отец лишится этого мерзкого артефакта, у нас появится шанс доказать Диодасу аф Иррамону, что Себериан готов пойти навстречу. Я вижу здесь единственное решение — найти кого-то, обладающего очень ловкими руками и природной скрытностью. Кого-то, кто достаточно отчаялся, чтобы пойти против своего падшего господина ради милости {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "И последнее. Нужно любой ценой заполучить клинок — Багряную пляску Кхейна. Пока он находится в руках Себериана, наше предложение вступить в переговоры с Инквизицией выглядит смехотворно. Если отец лишится этого мерзкого артефакта, у нас появится шанс доказать Диодасу аф Иррамону, что Себериан готов пойти навстречу. Я вижу здесь единственное решение — найти кого-то, обладающего очень ловкими руками и природной скрытностью. Кого-то, кто достаточно отчаялся, чтобы пойти против своего падшего господина ради милости {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}".

languages.text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."
languages.original_text: "И последнее. Нужно любой ценой заполучить клинок — Багряную пляску Кхейна. Пока он находится в руках Себериана, наше предложение вступить в переговоры с Инквизицией выглядит смехотворно. Если отец лишится этого мерзкого артефакта, у нас появится шанс доказать Диодасу аф Иррамону, что Себериан готов пойти навстречу. Я вижу здесь единственное решение — найти кого-то, обладающего очень ловкими руками и природной скрытностью. Кого-то, кто достаточно отчаялся, чтобы пойти против своего падшего господина ради милости {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. While it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. If my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here — find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth. Someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

"And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

"And finally: the Sword of Bloody-Handed Fury must be acquired at all costs. While it remains in Seberian's possession, open rebellion among his retinue is highly unlikely. A xeno-artefact of such power is a terrifying prospect in itself, but my father also wields it with superb skill. I can see only one solution here — find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth. Someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the God-Emperor. {n}Juvenna's lips curve slightly in a thin smile.{/n}

"And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. While it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. If my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here — find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth. Someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

"And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

"And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

languages.text: «Y por último: la espada, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Debemos obtenerla a toda costa. Mientras permanezca en posesión de Seberian, nuestra propuesta de negociar con la Inquisición parecerá irrisoria. Sin embargo, si mi padre no cuenta con ese terrible artefacto, podremos demostrar a Diodas af Irramon que Seberian está listo para cooperar. Solo veo una solución: encontrar a alguien con dedos muy ágiles y un don para el sigilo; alguien lo bastante desesperado como para rebelarse contra su señor caído por la gracia del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}».
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Y por último: la espada, la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Debemos obtenerla a toda costa. Mientras permanezca en posesión de Seberian, nuestra propuesta de negociar con la Inquisición parecerá irrisoria. Sin embargo, si mi padre no cuenta con ese terrible artefacto, podremos demostrar a Diodas af Irramon que Seberian está listo para cooperar. Solo veo una solución: encontrar a alguien con dedos muy ágiles y un don para el sigilo; alguien lo bastante desesperado como para rebelarse contra su señor caído por la gracia del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}».

languages.text: “最后：必须不惜一切代价，将凯恩的猩红之舞弄到手。只要此剑还在塞贝里安手中，我们与审判庭和谈的提议就会显得很可笑。但如果能让我的父亲失去那件邪恶造物，我们或许能向狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙证明塞贝里安愿意合作。我看只有一个办法：找个手脚极其灵巧、善于潜行的人。一个走投无路，愿意为了{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的恩典，背叛自己堕落主人的人。”
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “最后：必须不惜一切代价，将凯恩的猩红之舞弄到手。只要此剑还在塞贝里安手中，我们与审判庭和谈的提议就会显得很可笑。但如果能让我的父亲失去那件邪恶造物，我们或许能向狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙证明塞贝里安愿意合作。我看只有一个办法：找个手脚极其灵巧、善于潜行的人。一个走投无路，愿意为了{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的恩典，背叛自己堕落主人的人。”

languages.text: « Et enfin : il faut obtenir la lame, la Danse écarlate de Khaine, à tout prix. Tant qu'elle restera entre les mains de Seberian, notre offre de négociation avec l'Inquisition paraîtra risible. Cela étant, si mon père est privé de cet artefact infâme, nous pourrons peut-être prouver à Diodas af Irramon qu'il est disposé à coopérer. Je ne vois qu'une seule solution à ce problème : trouver quelqu'un qui ait un don pour la discrétion et qui soit particulièrement agile de ses dix doigts, mais aussi de suffisamment désespéré pour se retourner contre son maître déchu pour la grâce de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Et enfin : il faut obtenir la lame, la Danse écarlate de Khaine, à tout prix. Tant qu'elle restera entre les mains de Seberian, notre offre de négociation avec l'Inquisition paraîtra risible. Cela étant, si mon père est privé de cet artefact infâme, nous pourrons peut-être prouver à Diodas af Irramon qu'il est disposé à coopérer. Je ne vois qu'une seule solution à ce problème : trouver quelqu'un qui ait un don pour la discrétion et qui soit particulièrement agile de ses dix doigts, mais aussi de suffisamment désespéré pour se retourner contre son maître déchu pour la grâce de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}. »

languages.text: "Ve son olarak: Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı olan o kılıç ne pahasına olursa olsun ele geçirilmeli. Seberian'ın elinde olduğu sürece Engizisyon'la görüşme teklifimiz gülünç görünecektir. Ancak eğer babam o iğrenç eserden mahrum bırakılırsa Diodas af İrramon'a, Seberian'ın iş birliği yapmaya hazır olduğunu kanıtlayabiliriz. Burada tek bir çözüm görebiliyorum: Parmakları çabuk olup gizlilik konusunda yetenekli birini bulmak. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} lütfu için düşmüş efendisine karşı gelecek kadar çaresiz birini."
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Ve son olarak: Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı olan o kılıç ne pahasına olursa olsun ele geçirilmeli. Seberian'ın elinde olduğu sürece Engizisyon'la görüşme teklifimiz gülünç görünecektir. Ancak eğer babam o iğrenç eserden mahrum bırakılırsa Diodas af İrramon'a, Seberian'ın iş birliği yapmaya hazır olduğunu kanıtlayabiliriz. Burada tek bir çözüm görebiliyorum: Parmakları çabuk olup gizlilik konusunda yetenekli birini bulmak. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} lütfu için düşmüş efendisine karşı gelecek kadar çaresiz birini."

languages.text: "Und schließlich: Die Klinge, der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine, muss mit allen Mitteln beschafft werden. Solange sie in Seberians Besitz ist, würde unser Vorschlag, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln, lächerlich wirken. Würde mein Vater allerdings von diesem unheilvollen Artefakt befreit, können wir Diodas af Irramon vielleicht auch beweisen, dass Seberian kooperationsbereit ist. In meinen Augen gibt es nur eine Lösung ... wir brauchen jemanden mit flinken Fingern und einem Talent, sich zu tarnen ... jemanden, der verzweifelt genug ist, um sich für die Gnade des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} gegen seinen gefallenen Meister zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Und schließlich: Die Klinge, der Blutrote Tanz von Khaine, muss mit allen Mitteln beschafft werden. Solange sie in Seberians Besitz ist, würde unser Vorschlag, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln, lächerlich wirken. Würde mein Vater allerdings von diesem unheilvollen Artefakt befreit, können wir Diodas af Irramon vielleicht auch beweisen, dass Seberian kooperationsbereit ist. In meinen Augen gibt es nur eine Lösung ... wir brauchen jemanden mit flinken Fingern und einem Talent, sich zu tarnen ... jemanden, der verzweifelt genug ist, um sich für die Gnade des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} gegen seinen gefallenen Meister zu stellen."

languages.text: 「そして最後に、カインの血染めの舞踏であるその剣を、どんな犠牲を払っても手に入れる。シベリアンの手にその剣が握られている限り、インキジションとの交渉は笑いの種にしか過ぎない。しかし、父がその汚れた神器を奪われたならば、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンにシベリアンの協力を求めることができるかもしれない。この問題には、ただ一つの解決策がある。非常に器用で、忍びの才能に長けた、そして堕ちた主人に背き、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の恩寵を求めるほどに絶望した者を見つけることだ。」
languages.original_text: "And finally: the blade, the Crimson Dance of Khaine, must be acquired at all costs. As long as it remains in Seberian's possession, our proposal to parley with the Inquisition would seem laughable. However, if my father is deprived of that foul artefact, we may be able to prove to Diodas af Irramon that Seberian is ready to cooperate. I can see only one solution here: find someone with very nimble fingers and a gift for stealth — someone desperate enough to turn against their fallen master for the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}."

traits.locale_text: 「そして最後に、カインの血染めの舞踏であるその剣を、どんな犠牲を払っても手に入れる。シベリアンの手にその剣が握られている限り、インキジションとの交渉は笑いの種にしか過ぎない。しかし、父がその汚れた神器を奪われたならば、ディオダス・ア・イルラモンにシベリアンの協力を求めることができるかもしれない。この問題には、ただ一つの解決策がある。非常に器用で、忍びの才能に長けた、そして堕ちた主人に背き、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}の恩寵を求めるほどに絶望した者を見つけることだ。」
